title: Stop reading full file bodies in NoteStore.list()
description: In src/adapters/fs-note-store.ts, list() reads the entire body of every .md file just to extract the first line for the excerpt, then sends all bodies over IPC. For a vault with 100 notes averaging 50KB, that's 5MB of unnecessary I/O on every startup and file-watcher event. Fix: read only ~500 bytes for the excerpt, remove body from NoteInfo, and fetch it on demand via read().
close_reason: Incorporated into Tauri migration task nv_clone-1oq.2 — Rust backend will implement excerpt-only list() from the start

title: Add safety check for missing script tag in build.js
description: build.js:34 — html.indexOf('<script') returning -1 causes slice(0, -1) which silently corrupts output. Fix: throw if script tag not found.

title: Duplicated vault selection logic in vault.rs and menu.rs
description: src-tauri/src/commands/vault.rs:40-76 and src-tauri/src/menu.rs:96-122 have identical validate/write-config/set-state/start-watcher sequences. Fix: extract shared function.

title: Phase 2: Implement Rust backend commands
description: Rewrite the FsNoteStore logic in Rust. Implement 6 `#[tauri::command]` functions: `vault_get`, `vault_select` (using tauri-plugin-dialog), `notes_list`, `notes_read`, `notes_write`, `notes_delete`, `notes_rename`. Port path-traversal validation from `_assertSafeTitle()`. Use `serde` for NoteInfo serialization. Apply the optimization from nv_clone-155 (read only ~500 bytes for excerpt, don't send full bodies in list).

title: Implement vault commands in Rust
description: Implement vault_get and vault_select as #[tauri::command] functions. Use tauri-plugin-dialog for folder picker. Config persistence via tauri-plugin-store or manual JSON in app_data_dir(). Port the access-check validation from current main.ts.

title: Implement note CRUD commands in Rust
description: Implement notes_list, notes_read, notes_write, notes_delete, notes_rename as #[tauri::command] functions. Port _assertSafeTitle() path-traversal validation. Use std::fs for file I/O. Serialize NoteInfo with serde. Incorporate nv_clone-155 optimization: read only first ~500 bytes for excerpt in list(), don't send full body.

title: Implement file watcher in Rust
description: Replace chokidar with the notify crate. Watch vault_path/*.md with depth 0. Debounce events (~100ms) and emit a Tauri event (notes:changed) with the refreshed note list. Handle watcher restart on vault change.

title: Implement theme detection for Tauri
description: Detect OS dark/light theme using window.matchMedia('prefers-color-scheme: dark') in the Tauri adapter. Listen for changes via matchMedia.addEventListener('change', ...) and update the renderer. This replaces the Electron nativeTheme dependency entirely in the frontend — no Rust backend needed.

title: Implement native menu in Rust
description: Build the application menu using Tauri's menu API. Three items: Change Vault, Edit submenu (undo/redo/cut/copy/paste/selectAll), View submenu (toggle devtools). Handle macOS app menu role.

title: Write Rust unit tests for path-traversal validation and CRUD commands
description: Add #[cfg(test)] module with tests covering: _assert_safe_title equivalent (../ traversal, absolute paths, null bytes, UNC paths, mixed separators), notes_list/read/write/delete/rename happy paths and error cases. Security-critical path validation must have thorough coverage before migration is complete.

title: vault_get still uses .lock().unwrap() — missed in mutex hardening pass
description: src-tauri/src/commands/vault.rs:53-54 — vault_get uses .lock().unwrap() while all other mutex sites use .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner()). A poisoned mutex here will crash the app. Fix: change to .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner()) for consistency.

title: build.js HTML script-tag slicing is fragile
description: build.js:15-18 replaces script tags by finding <script offset in HTML string. Any structural change to index.html before <script breaks the build. Consider using a more robust approach (HTML parser, template markers).

title: Fix preserve-caught-error lint errors in IPC handlers
description: src/main.ts:131,139,147 — The re-thrown errors in notes:write, notes:rename, and notes:delete IPC handlers don't attach the original error as a cause. Fix: add { cause: err } to the new Error() calls.

title: notes_delete silently swallows all errors
description: src-tauri/src/commands/notes.rs:142-144 — match std::fs::remove_file(&path) { Ok(()) | Err(_) => Ok(()) } eats permission/IO errors. Fix: only swallow ErrorKind::NotFound, propagate other errors.

title: Arrow keys in search bar steal focus to results list
description: src/renderer/index.ts:519-520 — _moveSelectionInList calls item?.focus(), moving DOM focus from search input to the results list <li>. After one arrow press, further typing goes to the list item, not the search input. This is wrong for a keyboard-first app: arrow keys in search should navigate results while keeping cursor in the search field. Fix: only call focus() when event originates from results list; use scrollIntoView only when called from search input.

title: Fix duplicate nativeTheme listeners on window recreation
description: src/main.ts:192-196 — nativeTheme.on('updated', ...) registers a new listener each time createWindow() is called. On macOS, closing and reopening the window stacks listeners. Fix: guard against duplicate registration or remove before re-adding.

title: Phase 0: Pre-migration renderer cleanup
description: These renderer-only tasks should be done first — they make the frontend cleaner before the backend swap, and are unaffected by the migration.

title: Fix path traversal validation for case-insensitive filesystems
description: src/adapters/fs-note-store.ts:31 uses resolved.startsWith(this._vaultPath + path.sep) which is case-sensitive. On case-insensitive NTFS, this could be bypassed. Fix: use path.relative() and check for '..' prefix instead.

title: Add error logging to FsNoteStore silent catch blocks
description: src/adapters/fs-note-store.ts — Individual file read failures (line 63) and delete failures (line 85) are silently swallowed. Add console.error logging so I/O issues are diagnosable. The delete catch should also distinguish ENOENT from unexpected errors.
close_reason: Silent catches are intentional: skip unreadable files in list, empty string for missing notes, ignore already-deleted files

title: Fix autosave race condition causing data loss on note switch
description: The autosave captures `() => this._editor.value` as a closure (src/renderer/index.ts:319). If the user switches notes before the 500ms debounce fires, the closure reads the new note's content but saves under the old note's title — overwriting Note A with Note B's content. Fix: pass the body value directly at schedule time, or validate the title hasn't changed before writing.

title: Debounce search input filtering
description: In src/renderer/app.ts, every keystroke in the search bar triggers a full _renderResults() call that rebuilds the entire DOM results list. Fast typing causes unnecessary intermediate renders. Fix: add ~100-150ms debounce to the input event handler. Keep arrow-key navigation and Enter handling immediate.

title: Fix unused _token parameter in marked renderer override
description: src/renderer/controllers/preview-controller.ts:7 — The html() renderer override declares _token but never uses it. Fix: use destructuring or remove the parameter name.

title: Wrap IPC handlers in try-catch for proper error propagation
description: IPC handlers in src/main.ts:95-109 delegate directly to _noteStore methods. If _assertSafeTitle() throws, the rejection propagates raw to the renderer with no catch. Errors may leak internal details. Fix: wrap all IPC handlers in try-catch, return structured error responses.

title: Debounce/serialize file watcher push to prevent stale state
description: Multiple concurrent watcher events (add, change, unlink) and simultaneous IPC calls (notes:write, notes:delete) all invoke _noteStore.list() without synchronization (src/main.ts:52-109). This can send stale or inconsistent data to the renderer. Fix: debounce or serialize _push() calls.

title: Phase 1: Scaffold Tauri alongside Electron
description: Initialize the Tauri project structure without removing Electron yet, so both can coexist during development. Run `cargo tauri init`, configure `tauri.conf.json` (window size, title, CSP), add `Cargo.toml` with dependencies (serde, notify, tauri). Point Tauri at the existing `dist/renderer/` output. Verify the app opens with a blank webview loading existing HTML/CSS.

title: Add unit tests for FsNoteStore._assertSafeTitle path traversal
description: src/adapters/fs-note-store.ts — _assertSafeTitle() is security-critical path traversal validation with zero test coverage. Export it (or test via the public API) and add tests for: ../ traversal, absolute paths, mixed separators, null bytes, UNC paths.
close_reason: Private method already covered by renderer-side validateTitle tests; testing requires filesystem integration

title: Set up local TypeScript linting with eslint
description: package.json has an eslint lint script ('eslint src/**/*.ts test/**/*.ts') and eslint + typescript-eslint devDependencies, but there is no eslint config file (eslint.config.js / .eslintrc). The lint script likely fails or uses defaults. Fix: (1) create an eslint.config.js with typescript-eslint recommended rules, (2) verify 'npm run lint' passes, (3) document in CLAUDE.md.

title: Ctrl+D as delete shortcut is dangerous and unconventional
description: src/renderer/index.ts:488 — Ctrl+D triggers _deleteCurrentNote() with no confirmation. Ctrl+D is 'duplicate line' or 'select word' in most editors. Accidental note deletion with no undo is very risky. Fix: remove Ctrl+D as delete shortcut, or add a confirmation step.

title: Phase 5: Remove Electron and clean up
description: Delete Electron-specific files: `src/main.ts`, `src/preload.ts`, `src/ipc-channels.ts`, `src/adapters/fs-note-store.ts`, `src/ports/note-store.ts`. Remove Electron dependencies from `package.json` (electron, electron-builder, chokidar). Remove `src/renderer/adapters/ipc-adapter.ts`. Update TypeScript config. Update `window.d.ts` to remove Electron IPC types. Run tests to verify renderer logic is unaffected.

title: Fix unsafe optional chain passed to _openNote on click
description: src/renderer/index.ts:356 — this._openNote(this._filtered[idx]?.title) can pass undefined if idx is out of bounds. _openNote expects a string. Fix: guard with bounds check before calling.

title: Replace non-null assertions with safe alternatives
description: src/renderer/index.ts — Three non-null assertions that could crash: line 68 (getElementById!), line 273 (selectionStart!/selectionEnd!). Replace with null coalescing or guards.
close_reason: Non-null assertions are safe: getElementById on just-created element, selectionStart/End on text inputs

title: highlightMatches regex statefulness causes missed highlights
description: src/renderer/search.ts:41,45 — RegExp with g flag + .test() has stateful lastIndex. After .split(re), lastIndex is nonzero; .test() alternates true/false on consecutive calls. Fix: reset re.lastIndex = 0 before .test(), or compare part.toLowerCase() === q.toLowerCase().

title: Phase 6: Packaging and CI
description: Configure `tauri.conf.json` bundle settings for Linux (AppImage/deb), macOS (dmg), Windows (msi/nsis). Update any CI/CD pipelines. Update README with new build instructions. Verify cross-platform builds.

title: Split _bindEvents into focused private methods
description: src/renderer/index.ts:279-400 — _bindEvents() is a 120-line method mixing search input handlers, results list handlers, editor handlers, and global keybindings. Split into _bindSearchEvents(), _bindResultsEvents(), _bindEditorEvents(), _bindGlobalKeys(). No new classes or files needed.

title: Validate vault path accessibility after dialog selection
description: src/main.ts:79-91 — after dialog.showOpenDialog(), the selected path is used without verifying read access. If the directory is deleted between selection and first use, operations fail silently. Fix: check fs.access before setting vault.

title: Remove unused sortNotes/SortOrder exports from search.ts
description: src/renderer/search.ts — sortNotes() and SortOrder are exported and tested but never called anywhere in the app. Remove dead code or add TODO if planned for future use.
close_reason: sortNotes is a small tested utility for a planned sort-by-title feature; premature to delete

title: Distinguish 'no vault' from 'empty vault' in IPC responses
description: src/main.ts:93-97 — (await _noteStore?.list()) ?? [] returns [] when vault isn't configured, indistinguishable from 'vault exists but empty'. The renderer can't tell the user something is wrong. Fix: return null when vault is not set, handle in renderer.

title: Phase 4: Update build system
description: Replace `build.js` (esbuild for 3 Electron bundles) with frontend-only build. Remove main process and preload bundles. Keep esbuild for renderer TypeScript/CSS bundling, or switch to Vite (Tauri's default). Configure `tauri.conf.json` `beforeBuildCommand` and `beforeDevCommand`. Update `package.json` scripts: `npm start` → `cargo tauri dev`, `npm run build` → `cargo tauri build`.

title: Set up GitHub Actions CI for TypeScript and Rust
description: No CI exists. Create .github/workflows/ci.yml that runs on push/PR to master with: TS jobs: npm test, npm run typecheck, npm run lint. Rust jobs: cargo check, cargo test, cargo clippy -- -D warnings, cargo fmt -- --check. Use a matrix or separate jobs. Needs system deps for Tauri (libwebkit2gtk, libgtk-3, etc on Ubuntu). Reference tauri-apps/tauri-action or install deps manually.

title: Remove orphaned src/notes-helpers.ts
description: firstNonEmptyLine is duplicated in Rust (notes.rs:48-53) and not imported anywhere in TS runtime. Only used by test/notes.test.ts. Delete file and its test, or re-export if needed.

title: Use discriminated union for handleEnterDecision return type
description: src/renderer/app-logic.ts:14 — returns { action: string; title: string } but callers only check 'open' and 'create'. Should be a discriminated union: { action: 'open' | 'create'; title: string } for type safety.

title: formatRelativeTime: 'Xh ago' shown instead of 'Yesterday' for cross-midnight times
description: src/renderer/app-logic.ts:92-116 — The hour-based check (diffHours < 24 -> 'Xh ago') fires before the calendar-day check for 'Yesterday'. A note modified at 1am yesterday viewed at 11pm today shows '22h ago' instead of 'Yesterday'. Fix: check calendar day boundaries before the hour-based check.

title: Lazy-load marked and DOMPurify for preview
description: In src/renderer/controllers/preview-controller.ts, marked and DOMPurify are imported at module load time (~100KB combined, ~78% of renderer bundle). Preview is hidden by default and many sessions never toggle it. Fix: use dynamic import() to load these libraries only when toggle() is first called, reducing initial bundle parse/eval time.

title: Body search limited to first 512 bytes — misses matches in longer notes
description: src-tauri/src/commands/notes.rs:84-88 — read_note_info reads only 512 bytes into NoteInfo.body. Frontend filterNotes searches this truncated body. Matching text after byte 512 is silently missed. Fix: read full body for search, perform search on backend, or expand buffer significantly.

title: Move _pushTimer to module scope to prevent stale timers
description: src/main.ts:64 — _pushTimer is local to _startWatcher(). If _startWatcher() is called again while a timer is pending, the old timer isn't cleared. Move _pushTimer to module scope and clear it at the top of _startWatcher().
close_reason: Stale timer fires harmlessly at most once; old watcher is closed so no new triggers

title: Full note list re-read on every file change — O(n) I/O
description: src-tauri/src/watcher.rs:100 calls list_notes_from_path which does read_dir + opens every .md file to read 512 bytes. O(n) I/O per change event with 100ms debounce. For vaults with 1000+ notes, noticeable latency. Fix: maintain in-memory index, apply incremental updates from watcher event paths.

title: Lazy-create help overlay DOM on first use
description: In src/renderer/controllers/help-controller.ts, the help overlay (12-row table) is created and appended to the DOM at startup even though it's hidden until F1 is pressed. Fix: defer DOM creation to the first toggle() call.

title: Flush pending autosave when switching notes
description: src/renderer/index.ts:212 — _openNote() calls this._autosave.cancel() which discards pending saves. If the user typed changes and quickly switched notes, those changes are lost. Fix: call cancelAndFlush(this._currentTitle, this._editor.value) and await it before switching.

title: Add chokidar watcher error handler
description: src/main.ts:52-73 — no _watcher.on('error', ...) listener is registered. If the vault directory becomes inaccessible (permissions, unmount, deletion), the watcher silently dies and the app stops updating. Fix: add error handler that notifies the renderer.

title: onChanged Tauri listener is never unsubscribed
description: src/renderer/adapters/tauri-adapter.ts:29 — listen() returns a promise of an unlisten function that is never stored. Not a leak today (single-window app), but will leak if vault switching or app re-init is added.

title: Set up local Rust linting with clippy and rustfmt
description: No Rust linting is configured locally. Add: (1) cargo clippy and cargo fmt --check to the npm scripts or a Makefile/justfile so developers can run them easily, (2) document the commands in CLAUDE.md under Commands, (3) consider adding a pre-commit hook or npm run lint:rust script. Current state: only 'cargo check' and 'cargo test' are documented.

title: Unhandled promise from _reloadIfExternallyModified in onChanged handler
description: src/renderer/index.ts:367 — _reloadIfExternallyModified() is async but called without await in the synchronous onChanged callback. If notes.read() rejects, the error is an unhandled promise rejection. Fix: add .catch() handler or restructure the callback.

title: Add cleanup/destroy methods to controllers
description: resize, toast, and help controllers register event listeners and timers with no destroy() method. Not a problem in single-window SPA today, but poor lifecycle hygiene. Affects: resize-controller.ts (mousedown listener), toast-controller.ts (timers), help-controller.ts (click listener).

title: Body search is broken — filterNotes checks note.body but list_notes_from_path always sends empty string
description: list_notes_from_path in src-tauri/src/commands/notes.rs:100 sets body: String::new(). filterNotes in src/renderer/search.ts:19 checks note.body.toLowerCase().includes(q) — never matches. Spec requires search across title AND body. Fix: include body content (first N bytes) in list_notes_from_path, or add a dedicated backend search command.

title: Configure marked.js to disable HTML pass-through
description: src/renderer/controllers/preview-controller.ts:30 — marked.parse() passes through raw HTML by default. DOMPurify strips it, but disabling HTML in marked adds defense-in-depth. Fix: configure marked with sanitize/html options.

title: Add renderer-side title validation for path safety
description: src/renderer/app-logic.ts:139-150 — validateRename() only checks empty/duplicate. Doesn't check path traversal (../), null bytes, slashes, or dot-prefixed names. These are caught by _assertSafeTitle() server-side but give cryptic error toasts. Fix: add a validateTitle() function in renderer checking for /, \, \0, leading dots, and use it in both _createNote and rename flows.

title: Menu 'Change Vault' emits notes:changed redundantly — double render
description: src-tauri/src/menu.rs:106-112 — After calling apply_vault (which starts the watcher, which seeds a cache and emits notes:changed), the menu handler also calls list_notes_from_path and emits notes:changed. This causes the frontend to process two near-simultaneous updates, triggering double rendering. Fix: remove the manual emit and rely on the watcher's initial cache seed.

title: Phase 3: Create Tauri IPC adapter in renderer
description: Create src/renderer/adapters/tauri-adapter.ts implementing the existing NoteRepository, VaultService, ThemeService port interfaces. Use @tauri-apps/api/core::invoke() for commands and @tauri-apps/api/event::listen() for push events. Install @tauri-apps/api as a dependency and update window.d.ts with Tauri type declarations (remove Electron IPC types, add invoke/listen types). This is the only renderer file that needs to change — swap the adapter injection in src/renderer/index.ts.

title: CSP allows unsafe-inline for scripts
description: src-tauri/tauri.conf.json:23 — script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' weakens XSS protection. Remove unsafe-inline and use bundled JS only.

title: Bare Delete key deletes notes without Ctrl/Cmd modifier
description: src/renderer/index.ts:393-396 — e.key === 'Delete' triggers _deleteCurrentNote() with no Ctrl/Cmd guard. Spec requires Cmd/Ctrl+Delete. Fix: add (e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) check.

title: DRY up vault selection dialog logic in main.ts
description: src/main.ts — The vault:select IPC handler (lines 89-108) and the menu Change Vault handler (lines 165-185) duplicate the same dialog options, access validation, setVault/writeConfig/startWatcher sequence. Extract a shared _selectAndApplyVault() function.
close_reason: Superseded by Tauri migration — main.ts will be deleted in Phase 5

title: Autosave can write to renamed/deleted note title
description: AutosaveController.schedule() captures title by value at call time. If the user renames or deletes the note before the 500ms timer fires, the callback writes to the old title — resurrecting a deleted file or overwriting after rename. Fix: check _currentTitle at write time rather than closing over title at schedule time. Location: src/renderer/controllers/autosave-controller.ts:16-18

title: read_note_info splits multi-byte UTF-8 characters at 512-byte boundary
description: src-tauri/src/commands/notes.rs:84-88 — File::read reads raw bytes which may split a multi-byte UTF-8 character. from_utf8_lossy replaces the incomplete codepoint with U+FFFD, corrupting the excerpt display and breaking search for that character. Fix: scan backwards from the read end to find a valid UTF-8 boundary before converting.

title: notes_rename silently overwrites existing destination file
description: src-tauri/src/commands/notes.rs:148-157 — std::fs::rename silently overwrites on Linux/macOS. If note B exists and user renames A to B, B's content is destroyed. Frontend validateRename checks in-memory list but a race with external file creation could still cause data loss. Fix: add new_path.exists() check before fs::rename.

title: Fix no-useless-assignment lint error in autosave test
description: test/autosave.test.ts:84 — An assigned value is not used in subsequent statements. Fix: remove the unnecessary assignment or restructure the test.

title: SPEC.txt and CLAUDE.md still reference Electron — stale after Tauri migration
description: SPEC.txt references Electron, chokidar, nativeTheme. CLAUDE.md references Electron, chokidar, contextBridge, main.ts, preload.ts, FsNoteStore. None of these exist anymore. Both need full rewrite for Tauri/Rust backend.

title: Add validateRename test for whitespace-padded and case-variant titles
description: test/app-logic.test.ts — validateRename() has no test for whitespace-padded titles ('  Delta  ') verifying trim behavior, or for case-variant collision checking (currently case-sensitive, should verify intent).
close_reason: Case sensitivity is intentional (filenames); trim behavior is trivial

title: Use safer error type checking in autosave and toast
description: autosave-controller.ts:38 uses (err as Error).message — if a non-Error is thrown, message is undefined. Similar pattern in other catch blocks. Fix: use err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err).

title: partial_cmp().unwrap() on mtime sort can panic if mtime is NaN
description: src-tauri/src/commands/notes.rs:108, src-tauri/src/watcher.rs:135 — mtime is f64. The sort uses partial_cmp(...).unwrap(). If any mtime is NaN, partial_cmp returns None and unwrap panics. Fix: use .unwrap_or(std::cmp::Ordering::Equal).

title: Surface errors from FsNoteStore.list() instead of silent empty array
description: src/adapters/fs-note-store.ts:41-71 — both readdir failure and individual file read failures are silently swallowed, returning [] or skipping files. Users see an empty note list with no error indication. Fix: log errors and/or return an error indicator to the renderer.

title: Mutex .unwrap() throughout Rust code can panic on poisoned mutex
description: lib.rs:29, commands/vault.rs:32,71, commands/notes.rs:58, watcher.rs:36,93, menu.rs:116 — all use .lock().unwrap(). A poisoned mutex (from panic in another thread) will crash the app. Fix: use .lock().map_err(...) or document panic contract.

title: Parallelize renderer startup IPC calls
description: In src/renderer/index.ts, on DOMContentLoaded the app makes three sequential IPC calls: theme query, vault path fetch, then notes list. Theme and vault are independent and can run in parallel with Promise.all(), saving one IPC round-trip (~10-30ms).
close_reason: Superseded by Tauri migration — IPC mechanism changes entirely; will be naturally addressed in new Tauri adapter

title: Guard against rapid duplicate note creation
description: src/renderer/index.ts:223-239 — pressing Enter rapidly before _loadNotes() completes can trigger concurrent note creations with the same title. Fix: add a flag to disable input during async creation, or debounce.

title: Remove unsafe 'as string' casts for _vaultPath in main.ts
description: src/main.ts:105,179 — _vaultPath is cast as string after _setVault(), bypassing null safety. Add an early return guard instead so the type narrows naturally.
close_reason: Will be naturally fixed by vault DRY-up refactor (nv_clone-j8y)

title: _renderResults rebuilds entire DOM on every search keystroke
description: src/renderer/index.ts:151 — innerHTML = '' + full rebuild on every keystroke (120ms debounce). O(n) DOM nodes. For large note collections this causes visible jank. Fix: virtual list or diff-patch approach.

title: Autosave can overwrite external edits (race condition)
description: User edits → autosave scheduled (500ms) → external tool writes same file → watcher fires (100ms) → list re-renders but editor NOT reloaded → autosave fires → overwrites external change. Fix: on notes:changed, check if currently-open note was modified externally; compare timestamps or content before autosaving.

title: Add edge case tests for deleteWordBackward with tabs and multiline
description: test/app-logic.test.ts — deleteWordBackward() has no tests for tab characters, mixed whitespace (spaces + tabs + newlines), or single-character deletion at position 1.
close_reason: Tab handling covered by existing \s regex tests; minimal value

title: Add unit tests for path validation and edge cases
description: Missing test coverage for: _assertSafeTitle() path traversal validation, watcher edge cases (concurrent modifications, permission loss), autosave race condition on note switch, IPC error propagation to renderer. These are critical code paths with no automated tests.

title: Add IPC error message context to re-thrown errors
description: src/main.ts:131,139,147 — Re-thrown errors use the original message or a generic fallback, but don't include which operation failed. Change to: 'Failed to write note: <original message>' for better debuggability.
close_reason: Error messages already include descriptive text from _assertSafeTitle; adding prefix would be redundant

title: Delete handler fires twice due to event propagation from results list to global handler
description: src/renderer/index.ts:467-470,483 — Ctrl+Delete in the results list fires _deleteCurrentNote() from both the results keydown handler and the global keydown handler. Fix: add e.stopPropagation() in the results list handler, or remove the redundant handler.

title: _openNote does not handle notes.read() errors
description: src/renderer/index.ts:278 — If notes.read() fails (e.g., file deleted between listing and reading), the error is unhandled. _currentTitle is set but no body is loaded, leaving the editor in an inconsistent state. Fix: wrap in try/catch + show toast, similar to _createNote and _deleteCurrentNote.

title: Define IPC channel names as shared constants
description: src/preload.ts:6-14 — channel names are hardcoded strings. Misspelling a channel name is a silent runtime failure. Fix: define channel names as a shared const object used by both preload and main.

title: Add try-catch around marked.parse() in preview controller
description: src/renderer/controllers/preview-controller.ts:30 — if marked.parse() throws on malformed input, the exception propagates uncaught. Fix: wrap in try-catch, show fallback error message in preview panel.

title: No error handling on _loadNotes
description: src/renderer/index.ts:142-145 — if notes.list() throws, the app silently fails with no user feedback. Fix: wrap in try/catch + show toast.

title: _highlightSelected calls async _openNote without awaiting — unhandled rejection risk
description: src/renderer/index.ts:261-263 — _highlightSelected(true) calls _openNote which returns a Promise. The promise is not awaited or caught, risking unhandled rejections if notes.read() fails.
